title: THE HERSHEY COMPANY PURCHASES STOCK FROM HERSHEY TRUST COMPANY
text: HERSHEY, Pa. , Feb. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) announced today that it has completed a purchase of one million shares of its common stock from Hershey Trust Company, as Trustee for the Milton Hershey School Trust, for approximately $240 million, or $239.91 per share.

title: Hershey (HSY) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Hershey (HSY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 13.48% and 2.82%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Hershey earnings and outlook top expectations
text: Hershey Co. HSY, +0.31% topped expectations with its latest earnings and outlook Thursday morning, noting that unit pricing contributed to retail sales growth in its most recent period. The company notched fourth-quarter net income of $396.3 million, or $1.92 a share, up from $335.6 million, or $1.62 a share, in the year-earlier period.
